title: Specifying for AI
source_outline: What makes a good specification: testable, bounded, observable
Bad spec vs good spec: 'Make it better' vs 'Rewrite at Grade 8 level, max 80 words'
The 70/30 rule: AI implements; you specify and verify
When NOT to use AI: privacy, precision, legal accountability

next_assessment.title: Computational Thinking & AI Foundations
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can decompose a problem, write testable specifications, and describe and evaluate what an AI system can and cannot do.
